Title: Relates to reporting of drinking water lead testing in schools
Summary: Requires the department of health, in consultation with the commissioner of education, to create and issue a five-year plan with proposals to best mitigate the persistence of lead in schools.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to requiring the department of health to create and issue a five-year plan with its proposals to best mitigate the persistence of lead in school water across the state
